a “Primary care” defined as examination by general practice physician, emergency physician, nurse practitioner, pediatrician, geriatrician, dentist, or optometrist
b “Injury” defined as Diagnosis in the range ICD9:800–999
cMedical Service Plan payments occurring during the observation period 1991-Jan-01 to 2010-Dec-31
dObserved number of MSP payments
eCrude Rate per 10,000 person-years = Observed / Person-years x 10,000, (person-years is the sum of annual population counts during the observation period)
fStandardized Relative Risk (compared to the total population of BC during the same observation period) = Observed/Expected, (expected number is standardized
by age, gender and HSDA)
gAboriginal identity deduced from birth record, death record or MSP premium payment record; and residing in a postal code area that does not contain any
